Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Hallie Umrarong'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Without Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF HALLIE UMRARONG, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER MEMBERS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC SIMILARLY SITUATED Motion For Dismissal Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for dismissal without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
